title: McCarthy Tétrault Launches MT❯Forge to reimagine Legal Service Delivery
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Launches MT❯Forge to reimagine Legal Service Delivery
McCarthy Tétrault is launching its latest division, MT❯Forge , which has been designed to change how high-volume transactional legal work gets done. Powered by AI, scalable legal talent, and the Firm’s expertise, MT❯Forge delivers speed, consistency, and cost predictability, all without compromising quality.
This new division reflects our ongoing drive to lead the Canadian legal market through innovation. Positioned within the growing Alternative Legal Service Provider (ALSP) market, MT❯Forge is a unique offering that combines automation and staffing efficiencies with oversight from top-tier legal professionals, ensuring high quality and reliability. Services are co-designed with clients to align with their goals and workflows, creating solutions that are practical, efficient, and secure.
Under the leadership of Sahil Zaman , MT❯Forge will offer modular “work packages” tailored to client needs. Some examples of work packages include:
- Low and medium complexity contract review and negotiation using Firm-developed playbooks, contract resources and customized AI tools to streamline routine tasks
- Commercial mortgage preparation leveraging precedents, contract resources, and AI for greater efficiency
- High-volume capital market issuances, automated for speed and efficiency
- Small-cap M&A transactions using playbooks, contract resources, AI and our expertise
“MT❯Forge represents an important step forward in how we serve our clients,” said Matthew Peters , National Leader, Transformation. “By integrating playbooks, AI and scalable talent with the Firm’s expertise and talent, we are setting a new standard for efficiency and value, which are the hallmarks of the emerging ALSP market.”
“Our clients know that AI-driven service delivery is already shaping the way we work,” said Sahil Zaman , Leader of MT❯Forge. “With the backing of McCarthy Tétrault’s reputation and expertise, MT❯Forge gives clients confidence that innovation will never come at the expense of quality.”
From day one, MT❯Forge positions McCarthy Tétrault as having one of Canada’s leading ALSPs, combining technology, talent, and trusted relationships to help clients achieve their goals.
Learn how MT❯Forge can help you .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in all of Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its deep legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
